global_description: A small, slender bird with a rounded body and a short tail. It features a predominantly clay-colored plumage with subtle streaks, a pale underbelly, and a distinct facial pattern. The wings and tail are slightly darker, providing contrast to the lighter body.

part_details.plumage: Overall clay-colored with subtle streaks, providing a camouflaged appearance.
part_details.underbelly: Pale, contrasting with the darker upper parts.
part_details.wings: Slightly darker than the body, with a smooth texture.
part_details.tail: Short and slightly darker, complementing the wing color.
part_details.face: Distinct pattern with a pale eyebrow stripe and darker eye line.

spatial_relations: The wings are positioned laterally along the body.
The tail extends from the rear of the body.
The facial pattern is centered around the eyes.
